NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ASSIGNMENT OF RIGHTS, RESTRAINING ORDER, AND TURNOVER ORDER (TRANSACTION ID # 100042995) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC. A CORPORATION HEARING SET FOR AUG-20-2018 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 302
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC. A CORPORATION

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'S MOTION FOR ASSIGNMENT OF RIGHTS, RESTRAINING ORDER, AND TURNOVER ORDER IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 30, 2018 @ 9 A.M. THE PAPERS FILED BY THE MOVING PARTY DO NOT SPECIFICALLY IDENTIFY THE SOURCES OF INCOME TO BE ATTACHED. THE INFORMATION REQUESTED SHALL CONFORM TO THAT ORDERED IN A SIMILAR PROCEEDING IN THIS COURT (SFSC NO. 548742 - BIRITE V. AGUILAR.) THE MOVING PARTY SHALL PROVIDE SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEFING WITH THIS INFORMATION BY AUGUST 23, 2018. ANY OPPOSITION SHALL BE FILED BY AUGUST 28, 2018. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IS ADMONISHED THAT IF THIS IS INFORMATION IS NOT PROVIDED IN FUTURE MOTIONS, THE MOTIONS WILL BE DENIED RATHER THAN CONTINUED GIVEN THE REPEATED COURT ORDERS ON THIS ISSUE. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD; CLERK: WILLIAM TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order, And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Aug-30-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ryan L. Dahm of Cook Collection Attorneys, PLC, Telephone (415)989-4730, appearing for Plaintiff Align Technology, Inc.;
No other apperaances.

PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'S Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order, And Turnover Order.

Hearing is held and the motion is granted. Order is signed

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order, And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Aug-20-2018 Continued To Aug-30-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'S Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order, And Turnover Order.

Continued to August 30, 2018 @ 9 a.m. The papers filed by the moving party do not specifically identify the sources of income to be attached. The information requested shall conform to that ordered in a similar proceeding in this Court (SFSC No. 548742 - Birite v. Aguilar.) The moving party shall provide supplemental briefing with this information by August 23, 2018. Any opposition shall be filed by August 28, 2018. Plaintiff's counsel is admonished that if this is information is not provided in future motions, the motions will be denied rather than continued given the repeated Court orders on this issue.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)
